sourcePrompt: A military command tent, a large ridge-line canvas field tent about six meters long. A taut canvas roof peaks along a central ridge pole and breaks to sloping side walls, guy ropes stake out from the eaves all around, and the entrance flaps at one gable end are rolled open. Olive-drab canvas with visible seams, taut and field-grade.
handEdit: whole tent yawed -90deg: ridge now along Z, entrance +Z, matching the old TIJ command-tent orientation (game placements assume it)
